\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Implementation of the 2D-\/periodic homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s function. 

This file provides the Bloch-\/periodic (2D lattice) free-\/space Green\textquotesingle{}s function and its utilities\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Ewald-\/split evaluation of the scalar kernel G and source-\/gradient grad\textquotesingle{}G, including smoothed variants used in singularity subtraction.
\item RWG-\/weighted point–triangle integrals for vectors used in the SIE RHS and post-\/processing.
\item Batched same-\/triangle helpers for efficient assembly.
\end{DoxyItemize}

Important\+: This is a specialization of \doxylink{classGreenFHom3DPer}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer}; triangle–triangle assembly of D/K in the periodic free-\/space case is disabled in favor of layered kernels. Point–triangle routines are used for RHS/fields. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenFHom3DPer2D_8cpp_source}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer2\+D.\+cpp}}.
